requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — OSARTEC / OSN and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——OSARTEC / OSN 及项目接收
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——OSARTEC / OSN 及項目接收

summary.en: El Salvador's standards and technical-regulation route should be checked through OSARTEC and OSN before shipment, and grid-tied PV projects should also satisfy SIGET, distributor, buyer, and project-owner safety evidence expectations. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core international safety standards for power converters and inverters used in photovoltaic power systems. For a Salvadoran project, the safety file should cover the exact inverter model or family, AC and DC ratings, environmental ratings, protective functions, labels, installation instructions, and any configuration changes made for 60 Hz / 120-240 V service.
summary.zh: 萨尔瓦多的标准和技术法规路径应在出货前通过 OSARTEC 和 OSN 核验，并网光伏项目还应满足 SIGET、配电公司、买方和项目业主对安全证据的预期。IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 是光伏电力系统用功率变换器和逆变器的核心国际安全标准。萨尔瓦多项目的安全文件应覆盖准确逆变器型号或系列、交直流额定值、环境等级、保护功能、标签、安装说明，以及为 60 Hz / 120-240 V 服务所作的任何配置变更。
summary.zht: 薩爾瓦多的標準和技術法規路徑應在出貨前通過 OSARTEC 和 OSN 核驗，併網光伏項目還應滿足 SIGET、配電公司、買方和項目業主對安全證據的預期。IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 是光伏電力系統用功率轉換器和逆變器的核心國際安全標準。薩爾瓦多項目的安全文件應覆蓋準確逆變器型號或系列、交直流額定值、環境等級、保護功能、標籤、安裝說明，以及為 60 Hz / 120-240 V 服務所作的任何配置變更。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
OSARTEC / OSN adopted standards and conformity route where applicable
SIGET and distributor project requirements where applicable

summary.en: China's common PV inverter safety evidence includes GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, voluntary CQC or CGC certification, and CNAS-accredited domestic test reports. These documents may be useful as background, but GB/T evidence is not the same as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence and does not itself prove Salvadoran standards acceptance, SIGET acceptance, distributor acceptance, or project-owner acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国常见光伏逆变器安全证据包括 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、自愿性 CQC 或 CGC 认证，以及 CNAS 认可国内测试报告。这些文件可作为背景资料，但 GB/T 证据并不等同于 IEC 62109-1/-2 型式试验证据，本身也不能证明已被萨尔瓦多标准体系、SIGET、配电公司或项目业主接受。
summary.zht: 中國常見光伏逆變器安全證據包括 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、自願性 CQC 或 CGC 認證，以及 CNAS 認可國內測試報告。這些文件可作為背景資料，但 GB/T 證據並不等同於 IEC 62109-1/-2 型式試驗證據，本身也不能證明已被薩爾瓦多標準體系、SIGET、配電公司或項目業主接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: a China GB/T or voluntary domestic certificate should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for the specific model family and configuration supplied to El Salvador. Confirm whether OSARTEC / OSN has a Salvadoran adoption, whether the buyer or lender requires an ILAC-accredited report or certificate, and whether 60 Hz / 120-240 V configuration changes affect labels, ratings, protective functions, or the tested construction.
gap.zh: 差距：中国 GB/T 或国内自愿证书应补充针对供应至萨尔瓦多的具体型号系列和配置的 IEC 62109-1/-2 证据。应确认 OSARTEC / OSN 是否存在萨尔瓦多采纳版本，买方或融资方是否要求 ILAC 认可报告或证书，以及 60 Hz / 120-240 V 配置变更是否影响标签、额定值、保护功能或已测试结构。
gap.zht: 差距：中國 GB/T 或國內自願證書應補充針對供應至薩爾瓦多的具體型號系列和配置的 IEC 62109-1/-2 證據。應確認 OSARTEC / OSN 是否存在薩爾瓦多採納版本，買方或融資方是否要求 ILAC 認可報告或證書，以及 60 Hz / 120-240 V 配置變更是否影響標籤、額定值、保護功能或已測試結構。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where OSARTEC / OSN, SIGET, the distributor, procurement specification, lender, or project owner requires IEC 62109 safety evidence for the inverter model
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 evidence is commonly voluntary or project-specified in China and is not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A PV inverter supported only by China GB/T evidence should not be treated as ready for El Salvador safety acceptance. Confirm OSARTEC / OSN scope and provide IEC 62109-1/-2 model-family evidence before relying on the inverter for SIGET, distributor, buyer, or lender review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅有中国 GB/T 证据支持的光伏逆变器，不应被视为已满足萨尔瓦多安全接收要求。应确认 OSARTEC / OSN 适用范围，并在提交 SIGET、配电公司、买方或融资方审查前提供 IEC 62109-1/-2 型号系列证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅有中國 GB/T 證據支持的光伏逆變器，不應被視為已滿足薩爾瓦多安全接收要求。應確認 OSARTEC / OSN 適用範圍，並在提交 SIGET、配電公司、買方或融資方審查前提供 IEC 62109-1/-2 型號系列證據。
